title: Thai Custard Crepes
description: Delicate Thai-style crepes filled with a rich custard filling. A sweet and indulgent treat.
instructions: Make crepe batter by mixing eggs, sugar, and flour.
Pour 1/4 cup of batter into skillet and tilt to coat.
Cook for 1-2 minutes until crepe is lightly browned.
Flip crepe and cook for another 30 seconds.
Prepare custard filling by mixing custard powder with milk and sugar.
Heat the mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Fill crepes with custard filling and serve warm.
